name: exocrew
description: An AI delivery exoskeleton for solo builders and small teams.

interface.shortDescription: Install a disciplined AI delivery crew.
interface.longDescription: ExoCrew adds product thinking, engineering guardrails, test evidence, and safe operations to AI-assisted software delivery.
defaultPrompt: Turn this idea into a safe, testable delivery plan.
Review this change across product, engineering, test, and operations.
Prepare this project for a controlled release with rollback evidence.
